summary: Iteration 114 - Export Buttons Testing Complete. All new export buttons verified: (1) Notes tab has Print/PDF/Word buttons with data-testid, (2) Legal Framework tab has Print/PDF/Word buttons with data-testid, (3) Progress tab has Print/PDF/Word buttons with data-testid, (4) Case header has Print All/PDF All/Word All buttons with data-testid, (5) Notes Print button opens document-preview page, (6) Progress PDF button opens document-preview?mode=pdf, (7) Legal Word button triggers download with toast 'Word document ready', (8) Print All PDF button opens document-preview with combined content, (9) Timeline export buttons still work (existing functionality).
